description: A passenger on a flight wants to purchase a Wi-Fi pass for the duration of the flight.

nodes.task_description: Identify the passenger's flight details (flight number, seat number).

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the passenger's identity and location on the aircraft.

nodes.task_description: Present the available Wi-Fi pass options and their prices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent offers a '1-Hour Pass' and a 'Full Flight Pass'.

nodes.task_description: Process the payment for the selected 'Full Flight Pass' and provide access instructions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sells the pass and guides the user on how to connect.
